description_long: This is a modern wooden rocking chair with a distinctive slatted design, featuring vertical wooden slats forming both the backrest and the seat. The chair has a high, straight back and gently curved rockers that extend from the front to the rear, providing a smooth rocking motion. The armrests are flat and extend horizontally, supported by sturdy side frames. The wood grain is visible throughout, giving the chair a natural and elegant appearance. The seat and backrest are ergonomically contoured for comfort, with the slats providing ventilation and a lightweight aesthetic. The overall construction appears robust, suitable for both relaxation and decorative purposes in urban parks or patios.
description: A modern wooden rocking chair with vertical slats, high backrest, and curved rockers, featuring visible wood grain and flat armrests.
description_view_0: Front view showing the vertical slats, high backrest, and the full width of the seat and armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curved rocker base, angled backrest, and the profile of the armrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the vertical slats of the backrest and the symmetry of the frame.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same curved rocker and armrest profile as the other side.
